entries.description: Day schedule runtime, doctors/cabinets/timeslots/visits, popup linkage and patient-ready schedule packs
entries.proof_boundary: Ready for date-specific schedule extraction and patient-ready workbook with explicit limits

entries.description: Patient identity, patient hub, dossier tab route maps, comments/files/documents/family/history closures, medcards/xray/insurance boundaries, patient-ready schedule rows and finance-linked models
typical_sources: insurance and xray verified boundary docs
entries.proof_boundary: Current curated repo now closes patient access path plus comments/files/documents/family/schedule history/medical history methods through verified blueprint and sample bundle; some write paths and broad global coverage remain limited
entries.notes: Phase 5 adds remaining dossier-tab family closure through route/method packs and a sample dossier bundle

entries.description: Schedule ticket extraction, tooltip semantics and normalized dictionary
entries.proof_boundary: Most ticket families closed; schi-10 remains inferred
entries.notes: Do not confuse ticket tooltip with patient popup

entries.description: Report universe, report families, governed verdicts, file-first and dual-layer reference patterns
entries.proof_boundary: Strong current batch coverage, not every report family closed
entries.notes: RPT_4 and some finance families still validation_required

entries.description: Patient cashbox document models and finance enrichment layers
entries.proof_boundary: Patient/document-level finance modeling proven in reference cases; direct visit-to-cash remains unproven
entries.notes: Do not overclaim visit-level payment fact

entries.description: Browser/runtime extraction patterns, popup and tooltip probing, HTML-first interpretation
